metadata.latest_updates: Jan 2026: Removed deprecated tools (Truffle, Ganache, Brownie, Waffle). Added Ape Framework, Halmos, Hardhat Chai Matchers. AI auditing tools, account abstraction (ERC-4337, EIP-7702), L2 resources.

ethereum_core.name: Ethereum Official Documentation
ethereum_core.relevance: Official Ethereum docs, EVM, gas, consensus, nodes.

ethereum_core.name: Solidity Documentation
ethereum_core.relevance: Official Solidity language reference, syntax, best practices.

ethereum_core.name: Ethereum Yellow Paper
ethereum_core.relevance: Formal specification of Ethereum protocol and EVM.

ethereum_core.name: EIPs (Ethereum Improvement Proposals)
ethereum_core.relevance: ERC standards, protocol upgrades, community proposals.

ethereum_core.name: EVM Codes
ethereum_core.relevance: Interactive reference for EVM opcodes with gas costs.

ethereum_frameworks.name: Hardhat Documentation
ethereum_frameworks.relevance: Ethereum development environment with testing, deployment, debugging.

ethereum_frameworks.name: Foundry Documentation
ethereum_frameworks.relevance: Blazing fast Ethereum testing framework written in Rust (forge, cast, anvil, chisel).

ethereum_frameworks.name: Ape Framework
ethereum_frameworks.relevance: Python smart contract framework (Brownie successor), multi-chain native, modular plugins.

ethereum_libraries.name: OpenZeppelin Contracts
ethereum_libraries.relevance: Battle-tested smart contract library (ERC20, ERC721, Access Control).

ethereum_libraries.name: Web3.js Documentation
ethereum_libraries.relevance: Ethereum JavaScript API for interacting with nodes.

ethereum_libraries.name: Viem Documentation
ethereum_libraries.relevance: Type-safe Ethereum library with excellent DX, wagmi backend.

ethereum_libraries.name: Wagmi Documentation
ethereum_libraries.relevance: React hooks for Ethereum, wallet connection, transactions.

ethereum_libraries.name: RainbowKit Documentation
ethereum_libraries.relevance: Best-in-class wallet connection UI for React apps.

solana_core.name: Solana Documentation

solana_core.name: Solana Cookbook
solana_core.relevance: Practical recipes for Solana development with code examples.

solana_core.name: Solana Program Library (SPL)
solana_core.relevance: Collection of on-chain programs (tokens, governance, staking).

solana_core.name: Anchor Framework
solana_core.relevance: Rust framework for Solana programs, reduces boilerplate.

solana_core.name: Solana Web3.js
solana_core.relevance: JavaScript library for interacting with Solana blockchain.

solana_core.name: Metaplex Documentation

cosmos_core.name: CosmJS Documentation

security_tools.name: Slither Documentation
security_tools.relevance: Static analysis framework for Solidity, detects vulnerabilities.

security_tools.name: Mythril Documentation
security_tools.relevance: Security analysis tool using symbolic execution and SMT solvers.

security_tools.name: Echidna Documentation
security_tools.relevance: Fuzzing tool for Ethereum smart contracts, property-based testing.

security_tools.name: Manticore Documentation
security_tools.relevance: Symbolic execution tool for analyzing smart contracts and binaries.

security_tools.name: Certora Prover
security_tools.relevance: Formal verification tool with specifications in CVL language.

security_tools.name: OpenZeppelin Defender
security_tools.relevance: Operations platform with relayers, monitoring, automated tasks.

security_tools.name: Aderyn
security_tools.relevance: Rust-based static analyzer, faster than Slither for large codebases.

security_tools.name: Medusa Fuzzer
security_tools.relevance: Cross-platform Go fuzzer with parallelized testing, inspired by Echidna.

security_tools.name: Sherlock AI
security_tools.relevance: AI-powered auditing combining rule-based scanning with ML vulnerability detection (released Sept 2025).

security_tools.name: Olympix
security_tools.relevance: AI security for DevSecOps and CI/CD integration, continuous code scanning.

security_tools.name: AuditBase
security_tools.relevance: LLM-powered auditing with 423+ detectors, trained on 14,000+ audit reports.

security_tools.name: SuMo Mutation Testing
security_tools.relevance: Mutation testing for Solidity to assess test suite quality.

security_resources.name: Smart Contract Security Best Practices
security_resources.relevance: ConsenSys security patterns and known attack vectors.

security_resources.name: NIST SP 800-57 Part 1 Rev. 5 - Key Management
security_resources.relevance: Baseline guidance for cryptographic key management, lifecycles, and protections (useful for custody/signing models).

security_resources.name: Ethereum Smart Contract Security
security_resources.relevance: Chapter from Mastering Ethereum on security patterns.

security_resources.name: Rekt News
security_resources.relevance: DeFi hack post-mortems and security incident analysis.

security_resources.name: DeFi Hacks Analysis
security_resources.relevance: Reproduced DeFi hacks with POCs in Foundry.

security_resources.name: Secureum
security_resources.relevance: Security training bootcamp with audit techniques.
